Peripheral.Name: Embedded Flash
Peripheral.Description: The NVM memory interface manages CPU AHB I-Code and D-Code accesses to the NVM memory. It implements the erase and program NVM memory operations and the read and write protection mechanisms

Peripheral.Name: Data EEPROM
Peripheral.Description: The Data EEPROM memory block. It contains user data.

Peripheral.Name: OTP
Peripheral.Description: The Data OTP memory block. It contains the one time programmable bits.

Bit.Name: PRODUCT_STATE
Bit.Description: Life state code.

Values.Val: Open
Provisioning, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
iRoT-provisioned, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
TZ-Closed, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
Closed, Debug disabled, regression is possible
Locked
Regression
NS-Regression

Bit.Name: PRODUCT_STATE
Bit.Description: Life state code.

Values.Val: Open
Provisioning, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
iRoT-provisioned, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
TZ-Closed, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
Closed, Debug disabled, regression is possible
Locked
Regression
NS-Regression

Bit.Name: BOR_LEV
Bit.Description: Brownout level option status bit

Values.Val: BOR OFF, POR/PDR reset threshold level is applied
BOR Level 1, the threshold level is low (around 2.1 V)
BOR Level 2, the threshold level is medium (around 2.4 V)
BOR Level 3, the threshold level is high (around 2.7 V)

Bit.Name: BOR_LEV
Bit.Description: Brownout level option status bit.

Values.Val: BOR OFF, POR/PDR reset threshold level is applied
BOR Level 1, the threshold level is low (around 2.1 V)
BOR Level 2, the threshold level is medium (around 2.4 V)
BOR Level 3, the threshold level is high (around 2.7 V)

Bit.Name: IO_VDD_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDD voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDIO I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDIO I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDD_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDD voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDIO I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDIO I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDXSPI1_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDXSPI1 voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDXSPI1 I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDXSPI1 I/O power supply operating below 2.5V,I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDXSPI1_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDXSPI1 voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDXSPI1 I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDXSPI1 I/O power supply operating below 2.5V,I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDXSPI2_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDXSPI2 voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDXSPI2 I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDD I/O below 2.5 V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDXSPI2_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDXSPI2 voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDXSPI2 I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDD I/O below 2.5 V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDUSB_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDUSB voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDUSB I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDUSB I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDUSB_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDUSB voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDUSB I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDUSB I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IWDG_STOP
Bit.Description: IWDG Stop mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog frozen in system Stop mode
Independent watchdog keep running in system Stop mode

Bit.Name: IWDG_STOP
Bit.Description: IWDG Stop mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog frozen in system Stop mode
Independent watchdog keep running in system Stop mode

Bit.Name: IWDG_STDBY
Bit.Description: IWDG Standby mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog frozen in system standby mode
Independent watchdog keep running in system standby mode

Bit.Name: IWDG_STDBY
Bit.Description: IWDG Standby mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog frozen in system standby mode
Independent watchdog keep running in system standby mode

Bit.Name: BOOT_UBE
Bit.Description: Unique boot entry control, selects either ST or OEM iRoT for secure boot.

Values.Val: OEM-iRoT (user NVM)) selected
ST-iRoT (system NVM)) selected

Bit.Name: BOOT_UBE
Bit.Description: Unique boot entry control, selects either ST or OEM iRoT for secure boot.

Values.Val: OEM-iRoT (user NVM)) selected
ST-iRoT (system NVM)) selected

Bit.Name: BDRST_POR
Bit.Description: Backup Domain reset with Power on reset

Values.Val: The backup domain is not reset after a VDD domain brownout reset (BOR)
The backup domain is reset after a VDD domain brownout reset (BOR)

Bit.Name: BDRST_POR
Bit.Description: Backup Domain reset with Power on reset

Values.Val: The backup domain is not reset after a VDD domain brownout reset (BOR)
The backup domain is reset after a VDD domain brownout reset (BOR)

Bit.Name: IWDG_SW
Bit.Description: IWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: IWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
IWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: IWDG_SW
Bit.Description: IWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: IWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
IWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: WWDG_SW
Bit.Description: WWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: WWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
WWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: WWDG_SW
Bit.Description: WWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: WWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
WWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: NRST_STOP
Bit.Description: Core domain Stop entry reset option status bit

Values.Val: a reset is generated when entering Stop or Stop mode on core domain
no reset generated when entering Stop or Stop mode on core domain

Bit.Name: NRST_STOP
Bit.Description: Core domain Stop entry reset option status bit.

Values.Val: a reset is generated when entering Stop or Stop mode on core domain
no reset generated when entering Stop or Stop mode on core domain

Bit.Name: NRST_STDBY
Bit.Description: Core domain Standby entry reset option status bit.

Values.Val: a reset is generated when entering Standby mode on core domain
no reset generated when entering Standby mode on core domain

Bit.Name: NRST_STDBY
Bit.Description: Core domain Standby entry reset option status bit.

Values.Val: a reset is generated when entering Standby mode on core domain
no reset generated when entering Standby mode on core domain

Bit.Name: BKP_SRAM_ECC
Bit.Description: Backup RAM ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: BKPSRAM ECC check disabled
BKPSRAM ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: BKP_SRAM_ECC
Bit.Description: Backup RAM ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: BKPSRAM ECC check disabled
BKPSRAM ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM1_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM1 ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: SRAM1 ECC check disabled
SRAM1 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM1_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM1 ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: SRAM1 ECC check disabled
SRAM1 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM6_FIX_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM6 no flex ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: FIX SRAM6 ECC check disabled
FIX SRAM6 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM6_FIX_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM6 no flex ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: FIX SRAM6 ECC check disabled
FIX SRAM6 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM6_FLEX_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM6 flex ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: FLEX SRAM6 ECC check disabled
FLEX SRAM6 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM6_FLEX_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM6 flex ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: FLEX SRAM6 ECC check disabled
FLEX SRAM6 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: NVM256
Bit.Description: NVM word size option configuration bit

Values.Val: 128-bit NVM word
256-bit NVM word

Bit.Name: NVM256
Bit.Description: NVM word size option configuration bit

Values.Val: 128-bit NVM word
256-bit NVM word

Bit.Name: ITCM_AXI_SHARE
Bit.Description: Configure total ITCM RAM size with AXI SRAM1 sharing

Values.Val: 64-Kbyte total ITCM size
128-Kbyte total ITCM size (64 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)
192-Kbyte total ITCM size (128 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)
256-Kbyte total ITCM size (192 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)

Bit.Name: ITCM_AXI_SHARE
Bit.Description: Configure total ITCM RAM size with AXI SRAM1 sharing

Values.Val: 64-Kbyte total ITCM size
128-Kbyte total ITCM size (64 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)
192-Kbyte total ITCM size (128 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)
256-Kbyte total ITCM size (192 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)

Bit.Name: DTCM_AXI_SHARE
Bit.Description: Configure total DTCM RAM size with AXI SRAM6 sharing

Values.Val: 128-Kbyte total DTCM size
256-Kbyte total DTCM size (128 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM6 shared)

Bit.Name: DTCM_AXI_SHARE
Bit.Description: Configure total DTCM RAM size with AXI SRAM6 sharing

Values.Val: 128-Kbyte total DTCM size
256-Kbyte total DTCM size (128 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM6 shared)

Bit.Name: CPU_FREQ_BOOST
Bit.Description: CPU frequency boost enable

Values.Val: Cortex-M85 frequency boost disable, Cortex-M85 ECC enable
Cortex-M85 frequency boost enable, Cortex-M85 ECC disable

Bit.Name: CPU_FREQ_BOOST
Bit.Description: CPU frequency boost enable

Values.Val: Cortex-M85 frequency boost disable, Cortex-M85 ECC enable
Cortex-M85 frequency boost enable, Cortex-M85 ECC disable

Bit.Name: SWAP_BANK
Bit.Description: Bank swapping option status bit

Values.Val: SWAP disabled: Bank1 and Bank2 not swapped
SWAP enabled: Bank1 and Bank2 swapped

Bit.Name: SWAP_BANK
Bit.Description: Bank swapping option status bit

Values.Val: SWAP disabled: Bank1 and Bank2 not swapped
SWAP enabled: Bank1 and Bank2 swapped

Bit.Name: VTORNS
Bit.Description: Non secure VTOR address

Bit.Name: VTORNSLOCK
Bit.Description: A field locking the values of SWAP_BANK, and NSBOOTADD settings

Values.Val: VTORNS can still be modified
VTORNS is frozen

Bit.Name: VTORNS
Bit.Description: Non secure VTOR address

Bit.Name: VTORNSLOCK
Bit.Description: A field locking the values of SWAP_BANK, and NSBOOTADD settings

Values.Val: VTORNS can still be modified
VTORNS is frozen

Bit.Name: BOOTADD
Bit.Description: Non secure unique boot entry address

Bit.Name: BOOTLOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the values of BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK, and BOOTADD setting

Values.Val: The BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK and BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules.
The BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK and BOOTADD are frozen.

Bit.Name: BOOTADD
Bit.Description: Non secure unique boot entry address

Bit.Name: BOOTLOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the values of BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK, and BOOTADD setting

Values.Val: The BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK and BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules.
The BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK and BOOTADD are frozen.

Bit.Name: LOCKBL1
Bit.Description: OTP Block Lock

Bit.Name: LOCKBL1
Bit.Description: OTP Block Lock

Bit.Name: LOCKBL2
Bit.Description: OTP Block Lock

Bit.Name: LOCKBL2
Bit.Description: OTP Block Lock

Bit.Name: FRF_DIS
Bit.Description: Fast recovery fsm disable

Values.Val: The fast recovery fsm is enabled
The fast recovery fsm is disabled

Bit.Name: PM
Bit.Description: Programming mode option bit

Values.Val: Programming after soldering, the high cycle data area supports 100K cycles
Programming before soldering, User NVM supports 5 cycles

Bit.Name: CNT
Bit.Description: Nonvolatile nonsecure counter

Bit.Name: CNT
Bit.Description: Nonvolatile nonsecure counter

Bit.Name: SCNT
Bit.Description: Nonvolatile secure counter

Bit.Name: SCNT
Bit.Description: Nonvolatile secure counter

Bit.Name: SECWM1_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank 1 security WM area 1 start sector

Bit.Name: SECWM1_END
Bit.Description: Bank 1 security WM area 1 end sector

Bit.Name: SECWM1_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank 1 security WM area 1 start sector

Bit.Name: SECWM1_END
Bit.Description: Bank 1 security WM area 1 end sector

Bit.Name: HDP1_STRT
Bit.Description: HDP barrier start set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP1_END
Bit.Description: HDP barrier end set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP1_STRT
Bit.Description: HDP barrier start set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP1_END
Bit.Description: HDP barrier end set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: WRP1SGn1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP1SGn1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP1SGn2
Bit.Description: Bank 1 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP1SGn2
Bit.Description: Bank 1 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WriteLOCK1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 write protection lock

Values.Val: write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP is locked
write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP is not locked

Bit.Name: WriteLOCK1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 write protection lock

Values.Val: write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP is locked
write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP is not locked

Bit.Name: EDATA1_EN
Bit.Description: Bank1 NVM high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No NVM high-cycle data area
NVM high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA1_STRT
Bit.Description: EDATA1_STRT contains the start sectors of the NVM high-cycle data area in Bank1.

Bit.Name: EDATA1_EN
Bit.Description: Bank1 NVM high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No NVM high-cycle data area
NVM high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA1_STRT
Bit.Description: EDATA1_STRT contains the start sectors of the NVM high-cycle data area in Bank1.

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank 2 security WM area start sector

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank 2 security WM area end sector

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank 2 security WM area start sector

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank 2 security WM area end sector

Bit.Name: WRP2SGn1
Bit.Description: Bank 2 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP2SGn1
Bit.Description: Bank 2 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP2SGn2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP2SGn2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WriteLOCK2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 write protection lock

Values.Val: lock the write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP in Bank 2
write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP in Bank 2 is not locked

Bit.Name: WriteLOCK2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 write protection lock

Values.Val: lock the write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP in Bank 2
write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP in Bank 2 is not locked

Bit.Name: HDP2_STRT
Bit.Description: HDP barrier start set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP2_END
Bit.Description: HDP barrier end set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP2_STRT
Bit.Description: HDP barrier start set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP2_END
Bit.Description: HDP barrier end set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: EDATA2_EN
Bit.Description: Bank2 NVM high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No NVM high-cycle data area
NVM high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA2_STRT
Bit.Description: EDATA2_STRT contains the start sectors of the NVM high-cycle data area in Bank2.

Bit.Name: EDATA2_EN
Bit.Description: Bank2 NVM high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No NVM high-cycle data area
NVM high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA2_STRT
Bit.Description: EDATA2_STRT contains the start sectors of the NVM high-cycle data area in Bank2.

Bit.Name: PRODUCT_STATE
Bit.Description: Life state code.

Values.Val: Open
Provisioning, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
iRoT-provisioned, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
TZ-Closed, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
Closed, Debug disabled, regression is possible
Locked
Regression
NS-Regression

Bit.Name: PRODUCT_STATE
Bit.Description: Life state code.

Values.Val: Open
Provisioning, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
iRoT-provisioned, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
TZ-Closed, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
Closed, Debug disabled, regression is possible
Locked
Regression
NS-Regression

Bit.Name: BOR_LEV
Bit.Description: Brownout level option status bit

Values.Val: BOR OFF, POR/PDR reset threshold level is applied
BOR Level 1, the threshold level is low (around 2.1 V)
BOR Level 2, the threshold level is medium (around 2.4 V)
BOR Level 3, the threshold level is high (around 2.7 V)

Bit.Name: BOR_LEV
Bit.Description: Brownout level option status bit.

Values.Val: BOR OFF, POR/PDR reset threshold level is applied
BOR Level 1, the threshold level is low (around 2.1 V)
BOR Level 2, the threshold level is medium (around 2.4 V)
BOR Level 3, the threshold level is high (around 2.7 V)

Bit.Name: IO_VDD_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDD voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDIO I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDIO I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDD_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDD voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDIO I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDIO I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDXSPI1_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDXSPI1 voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDXSPI1 I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDXSPI1 I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDXSPI1_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDXSPI1 voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDXSPI1 I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDXSPI1 I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDXSPI2_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDXSPI2 voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDXSPI2 I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDD I/O below 2.5 V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDXSPI2_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDXSPI2 voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDXSPI2 I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDD I/O below 2.5 V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDUSB_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDUSB voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDUSB I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDUSB I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDUSB_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDUSB voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDUSB I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDUSB I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IWDG_STOP
Bit.Description: IWDG Stop mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog frozen in system Stop mode
Independent watchdog keep running in system Stop mode

Bit.Name: IWDG_STOP
Bit.Description: IWDG Stop mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog frozen in system Stop mode
Independent watchdog keep running in system Stop mode

Bit.Name: IWDG_STDBY
Bit.Description: IWDG Standby mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog frozen in system standby mode
Independent watchdog keep running in system standby mode

Bit.Name: IWDG_STDBY
Bit.Description: IWDG Standby mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog frozen in system standby mode
Independent watchdog keep running in system standby mode

Bit.Name: BOOT_UBE
Bit.Description: Unique boot entry control, selects either ST or OEM iRoT for secure boot.

Values.Val: OEM-iRoT (user NVM)) selected
ST-iRoT (system NVM)) selected

Bit.Name: BOOT_UBE
Bit.Description: Unique boot entry control, selects either ST or OEM iRoT for secure boot.

Values.Val: OEM-iRoT (user NVM)) selected
ST-iRoT (system NVM)) selected

Bit.Name: BDRST_POR
Bit.Description: Backup Domain reset with Power on reset

Values.Val: The backup domain is not reset after a VDD domain brownout reset (BOR)
The backup domain is reset after a VDD domain brownout reset (BOR)

Bit.Name: BDRST_POR
Bit.Description: Backup Domain reset with Power on reset

Values.Val: The backup domain is not reset after a VDD domain brownout reset (BOR)
The backup domain is reset after a VDD domain brownout reset (BOR)

Bit.Name: IWDG_SW
Bit.Description: IWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: IWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
IWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: IWDG_SW
Bit.Description: IWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: IWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
IWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: WWDG_SW
Bit.Description: WWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: WWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
WWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: WWDG_SW
Bit.Description: WWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: WWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
WWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: NRST_STOP
Bit.Description: Core domain Stop entry reset option status bit

Values.Val: a reset is generated when entering Stop or Stop mode on core domain
no reset generated when entering Stop or Stop mode on core domain

Bit.Name: NRST_STOP
Bit.Description: Core domain Stop entry reset option status bit.

Values.Val: a reset is generated when entering Stop or Stop mode on core domain
no reset generated when entering Stop or Stop mode on core domain

Bit.Name: NRST_STDBY
Bit.Description: Core domain Standby entry reset option status bit.

Values.Val: a reset is generated when entering Standby mode on core domain
no reset generated when entering Standby mode on core domain

Bit.Name: NRST_STDBY
Bit.Description: Core domain Standby entry reset option status bit.

Values.Val: a reset is generated when entering Standby mode on core domain
no reset generated when entering Standby mode on core domain

Bit.Name: BKP_SRAM_ECC
Bit.Description: Backup RAM ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: BKPSRAM ECC check disabled
BKPSRAM ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: BKP_SRAM_ECC
Bit.Description: Backup RAM ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: BKPSRAM ECC check disabled
BKPSRAM ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM1_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM1 ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: SRAM1 ECC check disabled
SRAM1 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM1_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM1 ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: SRAM1 ECC check disabled
SRAM1 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM6_FIX_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM6 no flex ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: FIX SRAM6 ECC check disabled
FIX SRAM6 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM6_FIX_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM6 no flex ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: FIX SRAM6 ECC check disabled
FIX SRAM6 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM6_FLEX_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM6 flex ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: FLEX SRAM6 ECC check disabled
FLEX SRAM6 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM6_FLEX_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM6 flex ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: FLEX SRAM6 ECC check disabled
FLEX SRAM6 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: NVM256
Bit.Description: NVM word size option configuration bit

Values.Val: 128-bit NVM word
256-bit NVM word

Bit.Name: NVM256
Bit.Description: NVM word size option configuration bit

Values.Val: 128-bit NVM word
256-bit NVM word

Bit.Name: ITCM_AXI_SHARE
Bit.Description: Configure total ITCM RAM size with AXI SRAM1 sharing

Values.Val: 64-Kbyte total ITCM size
128-Kbyte total ITCM size (64 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)
192-Kbyte total ITCM size (128 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)
256-Kbyte total ITCM size (192 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)

Bit.Name: ITCM_AXI_SHARE
Bit.Description: Configure total ITCM RAM size with AXI SRAM1 sharing

Values.Val: 64-Kbyte total ITCM size
128-Kbyte total ITCM size (64 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)
192-Kbyte total ITCM size (128 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)
256-Kbyte total ITCM size (192 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)

Bit.Name: DTCM_AXI_SHARE
Bit.Description: Configure total DTCM RAM size with AXI SRAM6 sharing

Values.Val: 128-Kbyte total DTCM size
256-Kbyte total DTCM size (128 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM6 shared)

Bit.Name: DTCM_AXI_SHARE
Bit.Description: Configure total DTCM RAM size with AXI SRAM6 sharing

Values.Val: 128-Kbyte total DTCM size
256-Kbyte total DTCM size (128 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM6 shared)

Bit.Name: CPU_FREQ_BOOST
Bit.Description: CPU frequency boost enable

Values.Val: Cortex-M85 frequency boost disable, Cortex-M85 ECC enable
Cortex-M85 frequency boost enable, Cortex-M85 ECC disable

Bit.Name: CPU_FREQ_BOOST
Bit.Description: CPU frequency boost enable

Values.Val: Cortex-M85 frequency boost disable, Cortex-M85 ECC enable
Cortex-M85 frequency boost enable, Cortex-M85 ECC disable

Bit.Name: SWAP_BANK
Bit.Description: Bank swapping option status bit

Values.Val: SWAP disabled: Bank1 and Bank2 not swapped
SWAP enabled: Bank1 and Bank2 swapped

Bit.Name: SWAP_BANK
Bit.Description: Bank swapping option status bit

Values.Val: SWAP disabled: Bank1 and Bank2 not swapped
SWAP enabled: Bank1 and Bank2 swapped

Bit.Name: VTORNS
Bit.Description: Non secure VTOR address

Bit.Name: VTORNSLOCK
Bit.Description: A field locking the values of SWAP_BANK, and NSBOOTADD settings

Values.Val: VTORNS can still be modified
VTORNS is frozen

Bit.Name: VTORNS
Bit.Description: Non secure VTOR address

Bit.Name: VTORNSLOCK
Bit.Description: A field locking the values of SWAP_BANK, and NSBOOTADD settings

Values.Val: VTORNS can still be modified
VTORNS is frozen

Bit.Name: BOOTADD
Bit.Description: Non secure unique boot entry address

Bit.Name: BOOTLOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the values of BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK, and BOOTADD setting

Values.Val: The BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK and BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules.
The BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK and BOOTADD are frozen.

Bit.Name: BOOTADD
Bit.Description: Non secure unique boot entry address

Bit.Name: BOOTLOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the values of BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK, and BOOTADD setting

Values.Val: The BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK and BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules.
The BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK and BOOTADD are frozen.

Bit.Name: LOCKBL1
Bit.Description: OTP Block Lock

Bit.Name: LOCKBL1
Bit.Description: OTP Block Lock

Bit.Name: LOCKBL2
Bit.Description: OTP Block Lock

Bit.Name: LOCKBL2
Bit.Description: OTP Block Lock

Bit.Name: FRF_DIS
Bit.Description: Fast recovery fsm disable

Values.Val: The fast recovery fsm is enabled
The fast recovery fsm is disabled

Bit.Name: PM
Bit.Description: Programming mode option bit

Values.Val: Programming after soldering, the high cycle data area supports 100K cycles
Programming before soldering, User NVM supports 5 cycles

Bit.Name: CNT
Bit.Description: Nonvolatile nonsecure counter

Bit.Name: CNT
Bit.Description: Nonvolatile nonsecure counter

Bit.Name: SCNT
Bit.Description: Nonvolatile secure counter

Bit.Name: SCNT
Bit.Description: Nonvolatile secure counter

Bit.Name: SECWM1_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank 1 security WM area 1 start sector

Bit.Name: SECWM1_END
Bit.Description: Bank 1 security WM area 1 end sector

Bit.Name: SECWM1_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank 1 security WM area 1 start sector

Bit.Name: SECWM1_END
Bit.Description: Bank 1 security WM area 1 end sector

Bit.Name: HDP1_STRT
Bit.Description: HDP barrier start set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP1_END
Bit.Description: HDP barrier end set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP1_STRT
Bit.Description: HDP barrier start set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP1_END
Bit.Description: HDP barrier end set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: WRP1SGn1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP1SGn1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP1SGn2
Bit.Description: Bank 1 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WriteLOCK1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 write protection lock

Values.Val: write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP is locked
write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP is not locked

Bit.Name: WriteLOCK1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 write protection lock

Values.Val: write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP is locked
write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP is not locked

Bit.Name: EDATA1_EN
Bit.Description: Bank1 NVM high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No NVM high-cycle data area
NVM high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA1_STRT
Bit.Description: EDATA1_STRT contains the start sectors of the NVM high-cycle data area in Bank1.

Bit.Name: EDATA1_EN
Bit.Description: Bank1 NVM high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No NVM high-cycle data area
NVM high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA1_STRT
Bit.Description: EDATA1_STRT contains the start sectors of the NVM high-cycle data area in Bank1.

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank 2 security WM area start sector

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank 2 security WM area end sector

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank 2 security WM area start sector

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank 2 security WM area end sector

Bit.Name: WRP2SGn1
Bit.Description: Bank 2 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP2SGn1
Bit.Description: Bank 2 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP2SGn2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WriteLOCK2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 write protection lock

Values.Val: lock the write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP in Bank 2
write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP in Bank 2 is not locked

Bit.Name: WriteLOCK2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 write protection lock

Values.Val: lock the write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP in Bank 2
write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP in Bank 2 is not locked

Bit.Name: HDP2_STRT
Bit.Description: HDP barrier start set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP2_END
Bit.Description: HDP barrier end set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP2_STRT
Bit.Description: HDP barrier start set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP2_END
Bit.Description: HDP barrier end set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: EDATA2_EN
Bit.Description: Bank2 NVM high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No NVM high-cycle data area
NVM high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA2_STRT
Bit.Description: EDATA2_STRT contains the start sectors of the NVM high-cycle data area in Bank2.

Bit.Name: EDATA2_EN
Bit.Description: Bank2 NVM high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No NVM high-cycle data area
NVM high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA2_STRT
Bit.Description: EDATA2_STRT contains the start sectors of the NVM high-cycle data area in Bank2.

Bit.Name: PRODUCT_STATE
Bit.Description: Life state code.

Values.Val: Open
Provisioning, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
iRoT-provisioned, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
TZ-Closed, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
Closed, Debug disabled, regression is possible
Locked
Regression
NS-Regression

Bit.Name: PRODUCT_STATE
Bit.Description: Life state code.

Values.Val: Open
Provisioning, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
iRoT-provisioned, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
TZ-Closed, Debug partially opened (only non-secure)
Closed, Debug disabled, regression is possible
Locked
Regression
NS-Regression

Bit.Name: BOR_LEV
Bit.Description: Brownout level option status bit

Values.Val: BOR OFF, POR/PDR reset threshold level is applied
BOR Level 1, the threshold level is low (around 2.1 V)
BOR Level 2, the threshold level is medium (around 2.4 V)
BOR Level 3, the threshold level is high (around 2.7 V)

Bit.Name: BOR_LEV
Bit.Description: Brownout level option status bit.

Values.Val: BOR OFF, POR/PDR reset threshold level is applied
BOR Level 1, the threshold level is low (around 2.1 V)
BOR Level 2, the threshold level is medium (around 2.4 V)
BOR Level 3, the threshold level is high (around 2.7 V)

Bit.Name: IO_VDD_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDD voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDIO I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDIO I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDD_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDD voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDIO I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDIO I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDXSPI1_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDXSPI1 voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDXSPI1 I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDXSPI1 I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDXSPI1_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDXSPI1 voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDXSPI1 I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDXSPI1 I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDXSPI2_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDXSPI2 voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDXSPI2 I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDD I/O below 2.5 V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDXSPI2_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDXSPI2 voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDXSPI2 I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDD I/O below 2.5 V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDUSB_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDUSB voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDUSB I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDUSB I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IO_VDDUSB_HSLV
Bit.Description: High-speed I/O at low VDDUSB voltage configuration bit

Values.Val: VDDUSB I/O power supply working in the full voltage range, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage disabled
VDDUSB I/O power supply operating below 2.5V, I/O speed optimization at low-voltage feature allowed

Bit.Name: IWDG_STOP
Bit.Description: IWDG Stop mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog frozen in system Stop mode
Independent watchdog keep running in system Stop mode

Bit.Name: IWDG_STOP
Bit.Description: IWDG Stop mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog frozen in system Stop mode
Independent watchdog keep running in system Stop mode

Bit.Name: IWDG_STDBY
Bit.Description: IWDG Standby mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog frozen in system standby mode
Independent watchdog keep running in system standby mode

Bit.Name: IWDG_STDBY
Bit.Description: IWDG Standby mode freeze option status bit

Values.Val: Independent watchdog frozen in system standby mode
Independent watchdog keep running in system standby mode

Bit.Name: BOOT_UBE
Bit.Description: Unique boot entry control, selects either ST or OEM iRoT for secure boot.

Values.Val: OEM-iRoT (user NVM)) selected
ST-iRoT (system NVM)) selected

Bit.Name: BOOT_UBE
Bit.Description: Unique boot entry control, selects either ST or OEM iRoT for secure boot.

Values.Val: OEM-iRoT (user NVM)) selected
ST-iRoT (system NVM)) selected

Bit.Name: BDRST_POR
Bit.Description: Backup Domain reset with Power on reset

Values.Val: The backup domain is not reset after a VDD domain brownout reset (BOR)
The backup domain is reset after a VDD domain brownout reset (BOR)

Bit.Name: BDRST_POR
Bit.Description: Backup Domain reset with Power on reset

Values.Val: The backup domain is not reset after a VDD domain brownout reset (BOR)
The backup domain is reset after a VDD domain brownout reset (BOR)

Bit.Name: IWDG_SW
Bit.Description: IWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: IWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
IWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: IWDG_SW
Bit.Description: IWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: IWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
IWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: WWDG_SW
Bit.Description: WWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: WWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
WWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: WWDG_SW
Bit.Description: WWDG control mode option status bit

Values.Val: WWDG watchdog is controlled by hardware
WWDG watchdog is controlled by software

Bit.Name: NRST_STOP
Bit.Description: Core domain Stop entry reset option status bit

Values.Val: a reset is generated when entering Stop or Stop mode on core domain
no reset generated when entering Stop or Stop mode on core domain

Bit.Name: NRST_STOP
Bit.Description: Core domain Stop entry reset option status bit.

Values.Val: a reset is generated when entering Stop or Stop mode on core domain
no reset generated when entering Stop or Stop mode on core domain

Bit.Name: NRST_STDBY
Bit.Description: Core domain Standby entry reset option status bit.

Values.Val: a reset is generated when entering Standby mode on core domain
no reset generated when entering Standby mode on core domain

Bit.Name: NRST_STDBY
Bit.Description: Core domain Standby entry reset option status bit.

Values.Val: a reset is generated when entering Standby mode on core domain
no reset generated when entering Standby mode on core domain

Bit.Name: BKP_SRAM_ECC
Bit.Description: Backup RAM ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: BKPSRAM ECC check disabled
BKPSRAM ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: BKP_SRAM_ECC
Bit.Description: Backup RAM ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: BKPSRAM ECC check disabled
BKPSRAM ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM1_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM1 ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: SRAM1 ECC check disabled
SRAM1 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM1_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM1 ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: SRAM1 ECC check disabled
SRAM1 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM6_FIX_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM6 no flex ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: FIX SRAM6 ECC check disabled
FIX SRAM6 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM6_FIX_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM6 no flex ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: FIX SRAM6 ECC check disabled
FIX SRAM6 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM6_FLEX_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM6 flex ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: FLEX SRAM6 ECC check disabled
FLEX SRAM6 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: AXI_SRAM6_FLEX_ECC
Bit.Description: SRAM6 flex ECC detection and correction enable

Values.Val: FLEX SRAM6 ECC check disabled
FLEX SRAM6 ECC check enabled

Bit.Name: NVM256
Bit.Description: NVM word size option configuration bit

Values.Val: 128-bit NVM word
256-bit NVM word

Bit.Name: NVM256
Bit.Description: NVM word size option configuration bit

Values.Val: 128-bit NVM word
256-bit NVM word

Bit.Name: ITCM_AXI_SHARE
Bit.Description: Configure total ITCM RAM size with AXI SRAM1 sharing

Values.Val: 64-Kbyte total ITCM size
128-Kbyte total ITCM size (64 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)
192-Kbyte total ITCM size (128 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)
256-Kbyte total ITCM size (192 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)

Bit.Name: ITCM_AXI_SHARE
Bit.Description: Configure total ITCM RAM size with AXI SRAM1 sharing

Values.Val: 64-Kbyte total ITCM size
128-Kbyte total ITCM size (64 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)
192-Kbyte total ITCM size (128 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)
256-Kbyte total ITCM size (192 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM1 shared)

Bit.Name: DTCM_AXI_SHARE
Bit.Description: Configure total DTCM RAM size with AXI SRAM6 sharing

Values.Val: 128-Kbyte total DTCM size
256-Kbyte total DTCM size (128 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM6 shared)

Bit.Name: DTCM_AXI_SHARE
Bit.Description: Configure total DTCM RAM size with AXI SRAM6 sharing

Values.Val: 128-Kbyte total DTCM size
256-Kbyte total DTCM size (128 Kbytes taken from AXI SRAM6 shared)

Bit.Name: CPU_FREQ_BOOST
Bit.Description: CPU frequency boost enable

Values.Val: Cortex-M85 frequency boost disable, Cortex-M85 ECC enable
Cortex-M85 frequency boost enable, Cortex-M85 ECC disable

Bit.Name: CPU_FREQ_BOOST
Bit.Description: CPU frequency boost enable

Values.Val: Cortex-M85 frequency boost disable, Cortex-M85 ECC enable
Cortex-M85 frequency boost enable, Cortex-M85 ECC disable

Bit.Name: SWAP_BANK
Bit.Description: Bank swapping option status bit

Values.Val: SWAP disabled: Bank1 and Bank2 not swapped
SWAP enabled: Bank1 and Bank2 swapped

Bit.Name: SWAP_BANK
Bit.Description: Bank swapping option status bit

Values.Val: SWAP disabled: Bank1 and Bank2 not swapped
SWAP enabled: Bank1 and Bank2 swapped

Bit.Name: VTORNS
Bit.Description: Non secure VTOR address

Bit.Name: VTORNSLOCK
Bit.Description: A field locking the values of SWAP_BANK, and NSBOOTADD settings

Values.Val: VTORNS can still be modified
VTORNS is frozen

Bit.Name: VTORNS
Bit.Description: Non secure VTOR address

Bit.Name: VTORNSLOCK
Bit.Description: A field locking the values of SWAP_BANK, and NSBOOTADD settings

Values.Val: VTORNS can still be modified
VTORNS is frozen

Bit.Name: BOOTADD
Bit.Description: Non secure unique boot entry address

Bit.Name: BOOTLOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the values of BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK, and BOOTADD setting

Values.Val: The BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK and BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules.
The BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK and BOOTADD are frozen.

Bit.Name: BOOTADD
Bit.Description: Non secure unique boot entry address

Bit.Name: BOOTLOCK
Bit.Description: Field locking the values of BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK, and BOOTADD setting

Values.Val: The BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK and BOOTADD can still be modified following their individual rules.
The BOOT_UBE, SWAP_BANK and BOOTADD are frozen.

Bit.Name: LOCKBL1
Bit.Description: OTP Block Lock

Bit.Name: LOCKBL1
Bit.Description: OTP Block Lock

Bit.Name: LOCKBL2
Bit.Description: OTP Block Lock

Bit.Name: LOCKBL2
Bit.Description: OTP Block Lock

Bit.Name: FRF_DIS
Bit.Description: Fast recovery fsm disable

Values.Val: The fast recovery fsm is enabled
The fast recovery fsm is disabled

Bit.Name: PM
Bit.Description: Programming mode option bit

Values.Val: Programming after soldering, the high cycle data area supports 100K cycles
Programming before soldering, User NVM supports 5 cycles

Bit.Name: CNT
Bit.Description: Nonvolatile nonsecure counter

Bit.Name: CNT
Bit.Description: Nonvolatile nonsecure counter

Bit.Name: SCNT
Bit.Description: Nonvolatile secure counter

Bit.Name: SCNT
Bit.Description: Nonvolatile secure counter

Bit.Name: SECWM1_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank 1 security WM area 1 start sector

Bit.Name: SECWM1_END
Bit.Description: Bank 1 security WM area 1 end sector

Bit.Name: SECWM1_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank 1 security WM area 1 start sector

Bit.Name: SECWM1_END
Bit.Description: Bank 1 security WM area 1 end sector

Bit.Name: HDP1_STRT
Bit.Description: HDP barrier start set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP1_END
Bit.Description: HDP barrier end set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP1_STRT
Bit.Description: HDP barrier start set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP1_END
Bit.Description: HDP barrier end set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: WRP1SGn1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP1SGn1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP1SGn2
Bit.Description: Bank 1 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP1SGn2
Bit.Description: Bank 1 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WriteLOCK1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 write protection lock

Values.Val: write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP is locked
write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP is not locked

Bit.Name: WriteLOCK1
Bit.Description: Bank 1 write protection lock

Values.Val: write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP is locked
write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP is not locked

Bit.Name: EDATA1_EN
Bit.Description: Bank1 NVM high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No NVM high-cycle data area
NVM high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA1_STRT
Bit.Description: EDATA1_STRT contains the start sectors of the NVM high-cycle data area in Bank1.

Bit.Name: EDATA1_EN
Bit.Description: Bank1 NVM high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No NVM high-cycle data area
NVM high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA1_STRT
Bit.Description: EDATA1_STRT contains the start sectors of the NVM high-cycle data area in Bank1.

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank 2 security WM area start sector

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank 2 security WM area end sector

Bit.Name: SECWM2_STRT
Bit.Description: Bank 2 security WM area start sector

Bit.Name: SECWM2_END
Bit.Description: Bank 2 security WM area end sector

Bit.Name: WRP2SGn1
Bit.Description: Bank 2 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP2SGn1
Bit.Description: Bank 2 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP2SGn2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WRP2SGn2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 sector group protection option status byte

Bit.Name: WriteLOCK2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 write protection lock

Values.Val: lock the write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP in Bank 2
write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP in Bank 2 is not locked

Bit.Name: WriteLOCK2
Bit.Description: Bank 2 write protection lock

Values.Val: lock the write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP in Bank 2
write protection of a group of pages protected by OB-HDP in Bank 2 is not locked

Bit.Name: HDP2_STRT
Bit.Description: HDP barrier start set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP2_END
Bit.Description: HDP barrier end set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP2_STRT
Bit.Description: HDP barrier start set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: HDP2_END
Bit.Description: HDP barrier end set in number of 8kb sectors

Bit.Name: EDATA2_EN
Bit.Description: Bank2 NVM high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No NVM high-cycle data area
NVM high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA2_STRT
Bit.Description: EDATA2_STRT contains the start sectors of the NVM high-cycle data area in Bank2.

Bit.Name: EDATA2_EN
Bit.Description: Bank2 NVM high-cycle data enable

Values.Val: No NVM high-cycle data area
NVM high-cycle data is used

Bit.Name: EDATA2_STRT
Bit.Description: EDATA2_STRT contains the start sectors of the NVM high-cycle data area in Bank2.
